intro:
I couldn't find any information on the plant "Omentaria hypoxidea". However, I found a similar plant named "Oenothera biennis" which is commonly known as Evening Primrose. 

Here's a paragraph on Evening Primrose (Oenothera biennis):

Evening Primrose (Oenothera biennis) is a flowering plant belonging to the Onagraceae family, native to North America. It is known for its health benefits, particularly in relieving symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats, as well as reducing inflammation and improving skin conditions like eczema and acne. The bioactive constituents of Evening Primrose include gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), a polyunsaturated fatty acid with anti-inflammatory properties, as well as flavonoids and phenolic acids. Evening Primrose is commonly prepared as an herbal oil, capsule, or tincture, which can be used internally to support skin health and reduce inflammation.
